section: Playwright e2e failures after path repair (2026-06-22)
summary: npm run test:e2e:nav — 3 passed / 5 failed (products nav, mega menu, planner hero CTA timeout). npm run test:planner-catalog — 35 failed (mostly page.goto timeouts to /planner/ and guest workspace).
action: Triage flaky timeouts vs UI regressions; ensure production npm run start server is healthy under parallel load.
note: Spec paths are fixed (tests/e2e/...); failures are app/test assertions, not missing spec files.

action: Convert local font assets to WOFF2 and update paths in fonts.ts.

section: 6. Planner asset pipeline still references separate /models/chairs GLB assets
summary: The planner asset pipeline still points at /models/chairs/*.glb and *-thumb.webp, but the duplicate cleanup in this pass only removed identical .dwg/.max files from public/models/chairs/.
action: Audit whether the GLB/thumb asset set is missing, needs generation, or should be repointed to a different canonical location.

summary: No online/offline status surfaced in planner chrome.
action: Add useOnlineStatus hook and toolbar warning when offline.

note: **Enabled:** supabaseSync + offlineMode default flags on; cloud save/load/delete wired in session handlers; offline queue syncs on reconnect.

**Guards:** .gitignore scratch patterns; npm run test:clean + pretest; coverage/Playwright scripts call test:clean; tests/root-configs.test.ts + tests/unit/clean-test-artifacts.test.ts; docs/TESTING.md. **Canonical outputs:** results/tests/ (Vitest), results/test-results/ (Playwright), results/coverage*.

section: 5. Test folder docs are out of sync with the live tree
action: Removed stale tests/CONTENTS.md and tests/INVENTORY.md; layout guarded by npm run test:layout:check.

section: Generated hardcoded audit CSV refreshed successfully
action: Keep the generator on the atomic temp-file write path so future refreshes survive transient file locks.
note: The audit was regenerated after the lock cleared, and the stale data/site/* hit now points at lib/site-data/* in the generated output.

Rewrapped the desktop/mobile planner panel orchestrators to reduce wrapper noise without changing catalog, inspector, layers, or session dialog code. Verification was not run because explicit permission was not given.

section: 2. Unused CSRF Protection on Mutating Endpoints (Parameter 32)
note: **Protected (session/admin mutations):** app/api/plans/route.ts POST; app/api/plans/[id]/route.ts PUT/DELETE; app/api/admin/plans/**; app/api/admin/themes/publish/route.ts; app/api/theme/manage/route.ts POST; app/api/audit/route.ts POST; app/api/customer-queries/manage/route.ts PATCH. **Client wiring:** GET /api/csrf/ issues cookie + token; browserApiFetch sends x-csrf-token; CsrfBootstrap prefetches on site/planner/crm/ops/admin layouts. **Intentionally unprotected (public/rate-limited/anonymous):** customer-queries POST, tracking POST, log-error POST, nav-search POST, filter POST, recommendations POST, generate-alt POST, configurator/smart-wizard POST.
The workbook package was checked and opens as a valid XLSX with 3 sheets, but the visual render pass was skipped because the spreadsheet artifact tool is not available in this environment.
The workbook package was checked and opens as a valid XLSX with 2 sheets, but the visual render pass was skipped for the same reason.
